name: Kate's Cooking Party 2
author: Poki
description: Kate's Cooking Party 2 is the exciting sequel to Kate's Cooking Party, bringing even more restaurant management fun. This time, you can play with your friends! As a friendly server, your goal is to keep customers happy. Take their orders, serve drinks, bring food to the table, clean up, and wash dishes as needed. Challenge your time management skills by completing all the levels solo or team up with friends to complete missions together. Are you ready to join this fun cooking party with your friends? How to play Kate's Cooking Party 2? Player 1: click on any object to move Player 2: use the keyboard to move. Follow the keys next to objects Who created Kate's Cooking Party 2? Kate's Cooking Party 2 is created by ANV Games. They have other casual puzzle games on Poki: Kate's Cooking Party , z-raid, Ocean , and laborer-2! How can I play Kate's Cooking Party 2 for free? You can play Kate's Cooking Party 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Kate's Cooking Party 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Kate's Cooking Party 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Kate's Cooking Party 2 with my friend? Yes! Kate's Cooking Party 2 is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend on the same computer!
